schemes.benefit_en: Free/subsidized treatment in government hospitals across Karnataka
schemes.benefit_hi: कर्नाटक के सरकारी अस्पतालों में मुफ्त/रियायती इलाज
schemes.eligibility: Karnataka residents (BPL: fully free, APL: subsidized)

schemes.benefit_en: 200 units free electricity per month for domestic consumers
schemes.benefit_hi: घरेलू उपभोक्ताओं को 200 यूनिट मुफ्त बिजली प्रतिमाह
schemes.eligibility: Karnataka domestic electricity consumers using ≤ 200 units/month

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,000/month to woman head of the household
schemes.eligibility: Karnataka women who are head of their household (above 18)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 3,000/month (graduates) or Rs 1,500/month (diploma) for unemployed youth
schemes.eligibility: Karnataka unemployed youth (graduated within 2 years), age < 25

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,000-10,000 scholarship for children of farmers
schemes.eligibility: Children of Karnataka farmers enrolled in Class 10 to degree
